channel.title: Autodesk — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Autodesk (autodesk).

item.title: CVE-2026-1288 · 5.5 MEDIUM — RFA File Parsing Vulnerability in Autodesk Revit
item.description: A maliciously crafted RFA file, when converted to FormIt via “Convert RFA to FormIt” in Autodesk Revit, can force a NULL Pointer Dereference vulnerability. Successful exploitation may cause the application to crash, leading to a denial-of-service con…

item.title: CVE-2026-7454 · 7.8 HIGH — WRL File Parsing Memory Corruption in Autodesk 3ds Max
item.description: A maliciously crafted WRL file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force a Memory Corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-7453 · 5.5 MEDIUM — WRL File Parsing Memory Exhaustion in Autodesk 3ds Max
item.description: A maliciously crafted WRL file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can cause a Stack Exhaustion vulnerability, leading to a denial-of-service condition.

item.title: CVE-2026-7452 · 7.8 HIGH — WRL File Parsing Memory Corruption in Autodesk 3ds Max
item.description: A maliciously crafted WRL file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force a Memory Corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-7451 · 7.8 HIGH — TIF File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write in Autodesk 3ds Max
item.description: A maliciously crafted TIF file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in the context…

item.title: CVE-2026-7450 · 5.5 MEDIUM — PAR File Parsing NULL Pointer Dereference in Autodesk 3ds Max
item.description: A maliciously crafted PAR file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force a NULL Pointer Dereference vulnerability. Successful exploitation may cause the application to crash, leading to a denial-of-service condition.

item.title: CVE-2026-4344 · 7.1 HIGH — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Assembly Component Name
item.description: A maliciously crafted HTML payload in a component name, when displayed during the delete confirmation dialog and clicked by a user, can trigger a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Autodesk Fusion desktop application. A malicious…

item.title: CVE-2026-4345 · 7.1 HIGH — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Design Name
item.description: A maliciously crafted HTML payload, stored in a design name and exported to CSV, can trigger a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Autodesk Fusion desktop application. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to read local…

item.title: CVE-2026-4369 · 7.1 HIGH — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Assembly Variant Name
item.description: A maliciously crafted HTML payload in an assembly variant name, when displayed during the delete confirmation dialog and clicked by a user, can trigger a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Autodesk Fusion desktop application. A ma…

item.title: CVE-2026-0875 · 7.8 HIGH — MODEL File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write
item.description: A maliciously crafted MODEL file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in t…

item.title: CVE-2026-0874 · 7.8 HIGH — CATPART File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write
item.description: A maliciously crafted CATPART file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.title: CVE-2026-0536 · 7.8 HIGH — GIF File Parsing Stack Based Buffer Overflow
item.description: A maliciously crafted GIF file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can cause a Stack-Based Buffer Overflow vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-0662 · 7.8 HIGH — Untrusted Search Path Vulnerability when opening max Files
item.description: A maliciously crafted project directory, when opening a max file in Autodesk 3ds Max, could lead to execution of arbitrary code in the context of the current process due to an Untrusted Search Path being utilized.

item.title: CVE-2026-0660 · 8.4 HIGH — Stack Based Buffer Overflow in GIF File Parsing
item.description: A maliciously crafted GIF file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can cause a Stack-Based Buffer Overflow vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-0661 · 8.4 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Write in RGB File Parsing
item.description: A maliciously crafted RGB file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force a Memory Corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-0537 · 8.4 HIGH — RGB File Parsing Memory Corruption
item.description: A maliciously crafted RGB file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force a Memory Corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-0538 · 8.4 HIGH — GIF File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write
item.description: A maliciously crafted GIF file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-0659 · 7.8 HIGH — USD File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted USD file, when loaded or imported into Autodesk Arnold or Autodesk 3ds Max, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the curren…

item.title: CVE-2026-0535 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored XSS in Electronic Library Component Description
item.description: A maliciously crafted HTML payload, stored in a component’s description and clicked by a user, can trigger a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Autodesk Fusion desktop application. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2026-0534 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored XSS in the value of a part attribute
item.description: A maliciously crafted HTML payload, stored in a part’s attribute and clicked by a user, can trigger a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Autodesk Fusion desktop application. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to rea…

item.title: CVE-2026-0533 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored XSS in Fusion desktop when attempting to delete a file
item.description: A maliciously crafted HTML payload in a design name, when displayed during the delete confirmation dialog and clicked by a user, can trigger a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Autodesk Fusion desktop application. A malicious act…

item.title: CVE-2025-10900 · 7.8 HIGH — MODEL File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: AA maliciously crafted MODEL file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.title: CVE-2025-10899 · 7.8 HIGH — MODEL File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: AA maliciously crafted MODEL file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.title: CVE-2025-10898 · 7.8 HIGH — MODEL File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: AA maliciously crafted MODEL file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.title: CVE-2025-10889 · 7.8 HIGH — CATPART File Parsing Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted CATPART file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-10888 · 7.8 HIGH — MODEL File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: AA maliciously crafted MODEL file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.title: CVE-2025-10887 · 7.8 HIGH — MODEL File Parsing Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted MODEL file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-10886 · 7.8 HIGH — MODEL File Parsing Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted MODEL file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-10884 · 7.8 HIGH — CATPART File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: AA maliciously crafted CATPART file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code i…

item.title: CVE-2025-10883 · 7.8 HIGH — CATPRODUCT File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted CATPRODUCT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.title: CVE-2025-10882 · 7.8 HIGH — X_T File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: AA maliciously crafted X_T file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in th…

item.title: CVE-2025-10881 · 7.8 HIGH — CATPRODUCT File Parsing Heap-Based Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted CATPRODUCT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Heap-Based Overflow vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.title: CVE-2025-9460 · 7.8 HIGH — SLDPRT File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted SLDPRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in the…

item.description: A maliciously crafted SLDPRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in the…

item.title: CVE-2025-9457 · 7.8 HIGH — PRT File Parsing Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted PRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-9456 · 7.8 HIGH — SLDPRT File Parsing Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted SLDPRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-9455 · 7.8 HIGH — CATPRODUCT File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted CATPRODUCT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in…

item.description: A maliciously crafted PRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in the co…

item.description: A maliciously crafted SLDPRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.description: A maliciously crafted CATPART file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force an Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in th…

item.title: CVE-2025-11797 · 7.8 HIGH — DWG File Parsing Use-After-Free Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted DWG file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force a Use-After-Free vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in the context of the c…

item.title: CVE-2025-11795 · 7.8 HIGH — JPG File Parsing Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted JPG file, when parsed through Autodesk 3ds Max, can force an Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-9458 · 7.8 HIGH — PRT File Parsing Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted PRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory Corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-10885 · 7.8 HIGH — Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted file, when executed on the victim's machine, can lead to privilege escalation to NT AUTHORITY/SYSTEM due to an insufficient validation of loaded binaries. An attacker with local and low-privilege access could exploit this to exe…

item.title: CVE-2025-8354 · 7.8 HIGH — RFA File Parsing Type Confusion Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted RFA file, when parsed through Autodesk Revit, can force a Type Confusion vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, cause data corruption, or execute arbitrary code in the context of the c…

item.title: CVE-2025-10244 · 8.7 HIGH — HTML Payload Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted HTML payload, when rendered by the Autodesk Fusion desktop application, can trigger a Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability. A malicious actor may leverage this vulnerability to read local files or execute arbitrary co…

item.title: CVE-2025-8892 · 7.8 HIGH — PRT File Parsing Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted PRT file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Memory Corruption vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2025-8894 · 7.8 HIGH — PDF File Parsing Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: A maliciously crafted PDF file, when parsed through certain Autodesk products, can force a Heap-Based Overflow vulnerability. A malicious actor can leverage this vulnerability to cause a crash, read sensitive data, or execute arbitrary code in the co…
